description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden chest of drawers with a rich reddish-brown finish and a modern, slightly trapezoidal profile. The front features two columns of six drawers each, totaling twelve drawers, each equipped with a small, round black knob handle. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain visible and no additional ornamentation or hardware. The chest stands on six short, sturdy black feet, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall construction suggests solid wood or high-quality veneer over engineered wood, with a smooth, matte finish. This piece is functional and robust, suitable for storage in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or garages.
description: A large, reddish-brown wooden chest of drawers with twelve drawers and black knob handles, standing on six short black feet. The design is modern and unadorned, with a smooth matte finish and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing twelve drawers in two columns, each with a black knob handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, unadorned wood surface and the slight trapezoidal shape.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, featureless wooden back with visible grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the plain wood surface and shape.
